title: Septenary PASS: (Z/9Z)* group structure + doubling cycle + diagonal completion
_fixture_purpose: Certifies the septenary numbers {1,2,4,5,7,8} = (Z/9Z)* = units mod 9 = elements coprime to 9. The doubling map (×2 mod 9) generates a 6-cycle visiting all units. The complement {0,3,6} = non-units = multiples of 3 = QA singularity set. Diagonal pairs sum to 9 (Yin-Yang completion). Even elements D-sum to 5 (odd), odd elements D-sum to 4 (even) — parity cross-over.

parity_sums.note: Even D-sum is odd (5); odd D-sum is even (4); cross-parity = Yin-Yang; 4+5=9 (completion)

group_proof.note: 2 is a primitive root mod 9: 2^k mod 9 for k=0..5 visits all units
